description: Credible, real-time National Hurricane Center data for AI agents: active storms, parsed advisories, tropical outlooks, and NWS tropical alerts. Text-first, link-outs for GIS.

tools.name: alerts_active
tools.description: Active tropical alerts. Pass a comma-separated --event list (Hurricane/Tropical Storm/Storm Surge x Warning/Watch). A descriptive User-Agent is mandatory (sent automatically). Optional: event, area. Returns array of Alert.

params.name: event
params.description: Comma-separated NWS event names (OR filter). Defaults to the six tropical watch/warning types.

params.name: area
params.description: Two-letter state or marine area filter (e.g. FL). Omit for all areas.

tools.name: storms_list
tools.description: List every active tropical cyclone across all basins. Returns [] when none are active (quiet season); run 'outlook' to see what may be developing.
